category_sources: source_facts.description says GPAC is a multimedia framework; official GPAC wiki documents GPAC, MP4Box, filters, packaging, streaming, and media processing.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gpac; official homepage and repository use the GPAC name.
docs_sources: Official GPAC wiki is the project documentation site; it has sections for MP4Box and GPAC filters.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/gpac/gpac, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists MP4Box and gpac; official GPAC wiki documents MP4Box media packaging and GPAC filters.
